channel.title: 9.2 on PrestaShop Developers' blog
channel.description: Recent content in 9.2 on PrestaShop Developers' blog

item.title: PrestaShop 9.2 is in feature freeze
item.description: As of July 9th, 2026, PrestaShop version 9.2 has entered the feature freeze phase. Learn more about the feature freeze, the next steps, and what’s coming in PrestaShop 9.2.
